items.title: Chiefs: 'Top-5 guy' in CB Delane worth trade up
items.summary: The Chiefs moved up in the NFL draft, acquiring the No. 6 pick from the Browns and using it to select LSU cornerback Mansoor Delane. Cleveland took Spencer Fano at No. 9.

items.title: Giants thrilled with picks: 'Couldn't do any better'
items.summary: The Giants addressed both sides of the ball in the first round of the NFL draft, selecting Ohio State linebacker Arvell Reese with the fifth pick and Miami offensive lineman Francis Mauigoa at No. 10.

items.title: Vikings pick DT Banks at 18 despite foot injury
items.summary: The Vikings made one of the boldest and riskiest selections in the first round of the NFL draft, choosing Florida defensive lineman Caleb Banks at No. 18.

items.title: Bucs draft Bain, confident in former Miami star
items.summary: The Buccaneers selected Rueben Bain Jr. with the 15th pick in the NFL draft, less than two weeks after news surfaced that the former Miami star was involved in a motor vehicle accident that resulted in the death of a passenger in 2024.

items.title: 'Ecstatic' Mendoza goes to Raiders with top pick

items.title: Sauce Gardner: I’m Colts’ first-round pick (next year, too)
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – Sauce Gardner isn’t buying into the notion that the Indianapolis Colts don’t have a pick in the first round of Thursday night’s NFL Draft. “I’m the first-round pick,’’ he said this week with a smile. Actually, more than that. “I’m the first-round pick two times,’’ Gardner said. This year, and in 2027. That [...]

items.title: Colts announce '2026 Schedule Challenge'
items.summary: The Indianapolis Colts today announced the “2026 Schedule Challenge,” where one contestant can win two tickets to Super Bowl LXI by most accurately predicting the Colts’ entire 18-week schedule for the 2026 regular season.
